message:
fix: reject flag-like positional args in bd create (bd-2c0)

When --help or other flags bypass Cobra flag parsing (e.g., programmatic
invocation), they end up as positional title arguments, creating garbage
issues. Add a guard that rejects positional titles starting with - and
directs users to --title flag if intentional.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
